children.text: statistical data reflecting services and activities provided to individuals during the preceding fiscal year;
statistical data collected under ;section 3012(a)(16) of this title

statistical data and an analysis of information regarding the effectiveness of the State agency and area agencies on aging in targeting services to older individuals with greatest economic need and older individuals with greatest social need, with particular attention to low-income minority individuals, older individuals residing in rural areas, low-income individuals, and frail individuals (including individuals with any physical or mental functional impairment); and
a description of the implementation of the plan required by .section 3012(a)(14) of this title

children.label: A
children.text: summarizing and analyzing the data collected under subchapters III and XI in accordance with for the then most recently concluded fiscal year;section 3058g(c) of this title

children.label: B
children.text: identifying significant problems and issues revealed by such data (with special emphasis on problems relating to quality of care and residents’ rights);

children.label: C
children.text: discussing current issues concerning the long-term care ombudsman programs of the States; and

children.label: D
children.text: making recommendations regarding legislation and administrative actions to resolve such problems.

children.label: A
children.text: the Special Committee on Aging of the Senate;

children.label: B
children.text: the Committee on Education and Labor of the House of Representatives; and

children.label: C
children.text: the Committee on Health, Education, Labor, and Pensions of the Senate.

children.label: A
children.text: the Administrator of the Centers for Medicare & Medicaid Services;

children.label: B
children.text: the Office of the Inspector General of the Department of Health and Human Services;

children.label: C
children.text: the Office of Civil Rights of the Department of Health and Human Services;

children.label: D
children.text: the Secretary of Veterans Affairs; and

children.label: E
children.text: each public agency or private organization designated as an Office of the State Long-Term Care Ombudsman under subchapter III or XI in accordance with .section 3058g(a)(4)(A) of this title

children.heading: Outreach activities; report on evaluations to be included in annual report
children.label: c Outreach activities; report on evaluations to be included in annual report

children.text: the number of older individuals reached through the activities;
the dollar amount of the assistance and benefits received by older individuals as a result of such activities;
the cost of such activities in terms of the number of individuals reached and the dollar amount described in paragraph (2);
the effect of such activities on supportive services and nutrition services furnished under subchapter III of this chapter; and

the effectiveness of State and local efforts to target older individuals with greatest economic need (including low-income minority individuals and older individuals residing in rural areas) and older individuals with greatest social need (including low-income minority individuals and older individuals residing in rural areas) to receive services under this chapter.
the Committee on Health, Education, Labor, and Pensions of the Senate;
the Committee on Appropriations of the Senate;
the Special Committee on Aging of the Senate;
the Committee on Education and Labor of the House of Representatives; and
the Committee on Appropriations of the House of Representatives.
